requirements.summary: Internet Identity authentication with session-aware UI and identity-gated actions.
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign in and sign out using Internet Identity
When signed out, primary actions that require identity (create listing, place order) prompt sign-in
Backend stores and returns data scoped to the caller principal where applicable (e.g., 'my listings', 'my orders')

file_operations.description: Ensure global styles are imported correctly and keep the InternetIdentityProvider + QueryClientProvider wiring intact for session-aware UI.

Create a login/logout button using the selected authorization component guidance (Internet Identity via useInternetIdentity) and clear React Query cache on logout. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a small session hook that exposes isAuthenticated, principal (string), and a clearSession() helper that clears cached app state on logout (e.g., via React Query). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add an auth gate wrapper that prompts the user to sign in when accessing identity-required pages/actions; integrate with the LoginButton flow. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create the app shell and route structure that is aware of authentication state, including guarded routes for identity-required pages and a consistent layout that surfaces sign-in/out.

requirements.summary: Profile onboarding and management with Farmer/Buyer roles and farmer public profile view from listings.
acceptanceCriteria: On first sign-in, user is prompted to create a profile and select role (Farmer or Buyer)
User can view and edit their profile later
Public profile view is available for farmers from listings (shows display name, location, bio)

file_operations.description: Implement profile fetch/save hooks using backend capabilities getCallerUserProfile/saveCallerUserProfile with React Query; avoid onboarding modal flash per selected authorization guidance. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a first-login onboarding dialog that collects display name, role (Farmer/Buyer), location, optional contact, and bio; only show when authenticated and profile is missing. Use shadcn-ui dialog/form primitives from immutable UI components by composing them externally. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a Profile page to view/edit the current user's profile fields and persist updates via the profile hook.

Create a compact public farmer profile card (display name, location, bio) that loads farmer profile via backend getUserProfile and is used from listing detail. Use shadcn-ui Card components by composing them outside immutable paths. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire Profile route and ensure onboarding dialog is mounted at a high level after login (without flashing) and is accessible from navigation.

requirements.summary: Farmer listing management (create/edit/publish/unpublish/delete) and buyer browsing visibility limited to published listings.
acceptanceCriteria: Farmer can create a listing and see it in 'My Listings'
Farmer can edit and unpublish/publish a listing
Buyer can browse published listings in a marketplace view
Unpublished listings are not visible to other users

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for listing CRUD and retrieval using backend capabilities (createListing/updateListing/deleteListing/publishListing/unpublishListing/getListingById/getListingsByFarmer/getAllListings).
Create farmer-only 'My Listings' page showing the signed-in farmer’s listings with actions to edit, publish/unpublish, and delete; hide from buyers via role gating.

Create a farmer-only Create/Edit Listing page with fields (title, category, unit, quantity, price, optional harvest date, location, description) and submit to backend via hooks; include publish/unpublish controls where appropriate.
Create Listing Detail page that displays listing fields, publication state for owner, and (for buyers) the order request entry point; integrate farmer public profile card for the listing’s farmer.
Add a role gate wrapper that reads the user’s app role (Farmer/Buyer) from the saved profile and conditionally allows access to farmer-only pages/actions.
Register routes for My Listings, Create Listing, Edit Listing, and Listing Detail; ensure navigation reaches these pages without manual URL entry.

requirements.summary: Marketplace browsing with search, filters (category/location), and deterministic sort with incremental loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Marketplace page lists published listings with pagination or incremental loading
Search and filters update results without requiring a full page reload
Sort options change ordering deterministically

file_operations.description: Create Marketplace page that lists published listings with keyword search, category filter, location keyword filter, and sort (newest, price low-to-high, price high-to-low); implement incremental loading (e.g., 'Load more').

Create a filters/search bar component for Marketplace that updates results client-side without full reload; compose shadcn-ui inputs/selects externally. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Implement a hook that fetches listings and applies filtering/sorting deterministically (preferably client-side over a single fetch) while ensuring only published listings are shown to non-owners.

Create a reusable listing card for marketplace grids/lists with consistent styling and navigation to listing detail; compose shadcn-ui Card/Badge externally. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire Marketplace route into navigation as a primary destination and ensure deep links to listing detail remain functional.

requirements.summary: Order request flow: buyers place requests; farmers accept/decline; buyer can cancel pending; both track status on dedicated pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Buyer can place an order request from a listing detail page
Farmer can view incoming order requests on a 'Sales' page and accept/decline each request
Buyer can view placed requests on a 'Purchases' page with statuses: Pending, Accepted, Declined, Cancelled
Buyer can cancel a Pending request
Order status changes are persisted and reflected after refresh

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for order lifecycle and lists using backend capabilities (placeOrderRequest/getBuyerOrderRequests/getFarmerOrderRequests/acceptOrderRequest/declineOrderRequest) and provide helpers to map/display statuses, including buyer cancellation if supported by backend behavior.

Create an order request form (quantity, pickup/delivery note, optional message) for buyers on the listing detail page with validation and friendly error handling; compose shadcn-ui form primitives externally. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create farmer-only 'Sales' page listing incoming order requests with actions to accept/decline; include loading/empty states and navigate to order detail.

Create buyer-only 'Purchases' page listing placed requests with statuses and a cancel action for Pending requests (wired to the backend capability/behavior that implements cancellation); include loading/empty states and navigate to order detail.
Create Order Detail page showing order metadata, status, participant actions (accept/decline for farmer, cancel for buyer when pending), and link back to listing.
Register Sales, Purchases, and Order Detail routes and ensure role-based navigation exposes only relevant pages.

requirements.summary: Asynchronous per-order message thread with author/timestamp, chronological display, and participant-only access.
acceptanceCriteria: Both participants (buyer and the listing’s farmer) can add messages to an order thread
Messages are persisted and load on page refresh
Users cannot read or write messages for orders they are not a participant of

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for loading and posting order messages via backend capabilities getOrderMessages/addOrderMessage; handle authorization failures gracefully and show user-friendly errors.

Create a message thread component for Order Detail page that renders messages chronologically with author and timestamp, and allows posting new messages; compose shadcn-ui textarea/button externally. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add formatting utilities for timestamps and for comparing principals (string comparison) to label messages as 'You' vs other participant, without displaying raw principal IDs.
Embed the OrderMessagesThread and ensure the UI only attempts to load/post messages when the user is authenticated; display backend authorization errors as access denied.

requirements.summary: Core navigation and pages with role-based visibility and refresh-safe routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Role-based navigation hides farmer-only pages from buyers and vice versa
Users can reach all pages via navigation without manual URL entry
Routing works on refresh (no broken deep links)

file_operations.description: Create a cohesive layout with header navigation (Marketplace, Profile, role-specific links), content container width, and sign-in/out control; integrate role gating to hide irrelevant pages.
Create a lightweight landing page explaining the app and directing users to sign in and browse marketplace.

Implement refresh-safe routing (prefer hash-based routing for static hosting) and register routes for: Landing, Marketplace, Listing Detail, Create/Edit Listing, My Listings, Sales, Purchases, Profile, and a Not Found fallback. Ensure all pages are reachable via navigation.

requirements.summary: Agriculture-inspired theme (earthy greens, warm neutrals) and consistent layout/cards/forms across pages (avoid blue/purple primary branding).
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent spacing, typography, and component styling
Primary/secondary buttons and form inputs have consistent visual states (hover/focus/disabled)
Theme colors are applied consistently and do not use blue/purple as primary branding colors

file_operations.description: Update global CSS variables/tokens to an agriculture-inspired palette (earthy greens + warm neutrals) and ensure typography/spacing defaults are consistent across the app while avoiding blue/purple as primary branding colors.
Adjust/extend Tailwind theme tokens as needed to support consistent layout (container, card shadows, focus rings) aligned with the updated CSS variables.

Create small wrapper components (e.g., PageHeader, Section, EmptyState, LoadingState) that compose existing shadcn-ui components for consistent cards/forms/layout without editing immutable UI paths. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Apply the cohesive layout system (header, content width, cards/forms spacing) across routed pages via the shared layout.

requirements.summary: Frontend form validation, structured error display, and loading/empty states for lists.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid submissions are blocked with clear inline error messages
Backend rejects invalid inputs and returns structured errors that the frontend displays
Loading and empty states are present for marketplace and order lists

file_operations.description: Add reusable validation helpers for required fields and numeric validation (quantity/price) and return English error messages for inline display.
Add a helper to normalize backend errors (including authorization traps) into user-friendly English messages and optionally field-level errors where applicable.
Add inline validation and friendly error handling for profile updates; show loading and disabled states during saves.
Add inline validation for listing create/edit (required fields, numeric validation) and show user-friendly errors returned from backend.
Add inline validation for order request submissions and ensure backend errors are displayed without crashing the page.
Ensure marketplace has explicit loading, empty, and error states, and that filter changes do not force full page reload.
Add loading/empty states and error handling for the farmer order request list and actions.
Add loading/empty states and error handling for the buyer order request list and actions.

requirements.summary: Add required generated static images and render them in landing and header branding (no backend image serving).
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at the specified paths under frontend/public/assets/generated
Landing page and header display the generated assets correctly in the built app
No backend endpoints are used for serving these images

file_operations.description: Add the generated app logo mark asset at the exact required path for static serving (no backend involvement).
Add the generated landing hero illustration asset at the exact required path for static serving (no backend involvement).
Add the generated category icon sprite asset at the exact required path for static serving (no backend involvement).
Render the header branding using the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/farm-market-logo.dim_512x512.png and ensure it displays correctly across routes.

Render the landing hero image using frontend/public/assets/generated/farm-market-hero.dim_1600x900.png and optionally reference frontend/public/assets/generated/category-icons-sprite.dim_1024x1024.png for category highlights.
